items: Starting a new colony (not Continue) launches an interactive tutorial: it walks you through building, brood and food cells, panning the view, and changing levels.
You can skip the tutorial anytime; finishing or skipping is remembered in this browser.
A loading screen appears while the game prepares assets; the menu fades in when ready.
Background music starts after you choose New game or Continue.
The launch screen can show a short list of gameplay changes after an update.
Use Got it to dismiss; your browser remembers the last version you saw.
